system.description:
The Healer is a partial Mage class that does not use spells. Instead, its abilities mend wounds, cure illnesses, and sustain allies. Healer Benefits. It is taken by an Adventurer with another partial class; a Partial Warrior/Healer might be a grizzled combat medic, a Partial Expert/Healer an erudite physician, and a Partial Necromancer/Healer an adept of life and death. All Healers gain Heal at level-0, or level-1 if already trained. Healers focus on arcane healing abilities that require touch and concentration, work in armor or with a shield, and are subtle. At first level, a Healer gains Healing Touch and one additional ability; choices are permanent.
